cells clearing 1/50: 9 of 12; gamma=1/4 cells clearing: 3 of 3

== Reporting-only legs (CANNOT flip the decision) ==
mass split (1/2, 1/2): band APPROVE-BAND, 10 of 12 clear, gamma=1/4 3 of 3
mass split (4/5, 1/5): band NEITHER-BAND, 8 of 12 clear, gamma=1/4 2 of 3
